readme_html:
Awesome AI Agents

A curated list of AI agents, categorized into open-source projects and closed-source projects/companies.

Contents

  • Open-source Projects
  • Closed-source Projects & Companies

Open-source Projects

  • Adala - Autonomous data labeling agent framework.
  • AgentGPT - Browser-based no-code AI agent tool.
  • AutoGen - Multi-agent AI framework by Microsoft.
  • CrewAI - Framework for multi-agent orchestration.
  • Agent4Rec - A recommender system simulator using 1,000 generative agents.
  • AgentForge - LLM-agnostic platform for building and testing AI agents.
  • AgentPilot - Desktop app for building, managing, and chatting with AI agents.
  • Agents - Library/framework for building language agents.
  • AgentVerse - Platform for task-solving and simulation AI agents.
  • AI Legion - Multi-agent system similar to AutoGPT.
  • Aider - Command-line AI coding assistant.
  • AIlice - Task execution AI agent with dynamic agent trees.
  • AutoGPT - An experimental project for fully autonomous GPT-4.
  • Automata - AI-driven code generation and automation framework.
  • Autonomous HR Chatbot - AI-powered HR query assistant.
  • AutoPR - Automated pull request AI agent.
  • BabyAGI - Autonomous AI task manager.
  • BabyBeeAGI - Task management and BabyAGI enhancement.
  • BeeBot - Early-stage AI agent research project.
  • Blinky - AI debugging assistant for VSCode.
  • Bloop - AI-powered semantic code search engine.
  • BondAI - Autonomous AI assistant with CLI and RESTful API.
  • Cal.ai - Open-source scheduling assistant.
  • CAMEL - Communicative agents for mind exploration.
  • ChatArena - Multi-agent interaction framework.
  • ChatDev - AI-driven software development team.
  • ChemCrow - AI chemistry assistant.
  • Clippy - Autonomous AI coding agent.
  • CodeFuse-ChatBot - AI-driven software development lifecycle assistant.
  • Databerry - No-code AI chatbot builder.
  • DemoGPT - AI-powered app prototyping tool.
  • DevGPT - AI-powered virtual software development team.
  • Devika - AI-powered software engineer.
  • Devon - Open-source Devin alternative.
  • DevOpsGPT - AI-driven software development automation.
  • dotagent - Deployable AI agents for cloud, PC, and mobile.
  • Eidolon - Modular AI agent SDK.
  • FastAgency - Multi-agent AI workflow deployment tool.
  • Flowise - Low-code AI agent builder.
  • Friday - AI assistant for Node.js development.
  • Giselle - AI for Agentic Workflows. Human-AI Collaboration. Open Source.
  • GPTSwarm - Optimizable graph-based AI agents.
  • Upsonic - Reliable agent framework that support MCP.

License: CC0

See CONTRIBUTING.md for contribution guidelines.

For AI agent-related SDKs, frameworks, and tools, see Awesome SDKs for AI Agents.

External links: Productivity AI Agents · Top AI Agents · There's an AI
